title: Nimble
description: Perspective animation · Auto third person · Elytra camera roll
body:
> I probably won't update Nimble to future versions. I would recommend using Leawind's Third Person, which with a little configuration can replace the functionality of Nimble.

# Nimble

Nimble is a simple mod that adds smooth transition animation on player perspective changes. It also makes screen rolls when you fly using elytra, and switches perspective when riding a vehicle.

The third-person front view now requires holding F4.

Client-side only. All these features can be disabled or configured if you have installed Kiwi. Besides, in-game config UI is provided if you have installed Cloth Config

![demo image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q5UvqqQd/images/4a6f05ade0b8d480e4288ae7c8534eecf7c6edc8.gif)
